description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a rectangular footprint and a flat, dark gray roof. The exterior is clad in light blue horizontal siding, giving it a clean and uniform appearance. The facade features a symmetrical arrangement of white-framed windows, with four windows per floor, evenly spaced across all visible sides. The front side includes a single, centered entrance door at ground level, also framed in white. There are no balconies, decorative elements, or protrusions, emphasizing a simple and functional design. The building's overall style is reminiscent of early 20th-century urban residential architecture, commonly found in North American cities.
description: A rectangular, light blue apartment building with a flat roof, white-framed windows, and a single front entrance. The design is symmetrical and minimalistic, with no balconies or decorative features.
description_view_0: This side shows a flat facade with four rows of four white-framed windows, no entrance or other features.
description_view_1: This is the front view, featuring a centered single door at the ground level and four rows of four windows above and beside it.
description_view_2: This side mirrors view 0, with four rows of four windows and no entrance or distinguishing features.
description_view_3: This side is identical to views 0 and 2, with only windows visible and no entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a highly symmetrical grid pattern, with four evenly spaced windows per floor on each visible side, aligned vertically and horizontally.
